[@microsoft/fast-element](../fast-element/index.html) &gt; [attributeMap](../fast-element.attributemap/index.html)

## attributeMap() function

Creates a [FASTElementExtension](../fast-element.fastelementextension/) that registers attribute-map configuration for a custom element. The configuration is stored in a pending registry and consumed by `TemplateElement` during template parsing.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function attributeMap(config?: AttributeMapConfig): FASTElementExtension;
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter


</th><th>

Type


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

config


</td><td>

[AttributeMapConfig](../fast-element.attributemapconfig/)


</td><td>

_(Optional)_ Optional configuration for attribute mapping strategy.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

[FASTElementExtension](../fast-element.fastelementextension/)

A `FASTElementExtension` callback.

## Example


```ts
// Map all leaf properties as attributes (default strategy)
MyElement.define({ name: "my-element", templateOptions: "defer-and-hydrate" }, [
    attributeMap(),
]);

// Use camelCase naming strategy
MyElement.define({ name: "my-element", templateOptions: "defer-and-hydrate" }, [
    attributeMap({ attributeNameStrategy: "camelCase" }),
]);
```
